name: gemini-cli-scheduler
description: Task scheduling extension for Gemini CLI
author: Hermann Hahn

scripts.update:version: npm run lint && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.publish:release: git push origin main --follow-tags && npm run push:release
scripts.push:release: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v' + v + ' --generate-notes', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.deploy: git checkout main && git pull origin main && npm run lint && npx webpack && node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git tag v' + v + ' && git push origin v' + v, {stdio: 'inherit'})" && npm run push:release && npm run cleanup-releases && npm run update && git checkout development
